spirit_gem_rule: skillTypes contains Persistent(140) AND (HasReservation(12) OR Aura(39) OR Herald(52)), OR tags.persistent && (tags.aura || tags.herald || tags.buff)
meta_gem_rule: gemType=='Meta' OR tags.meta OR skillTypes contains Meta(122)
compatibility_rule: A support S can support active A iff: (S.requireSkillTypes is empty OR A.skillTypes & S.requireSkillTypes != empty) AND (A.skillTypes & S.excludeSkillTypes is empty)
